examples: In this paper, a novel tensor subspace learning algorithm, tensor locality discriminant projection, is proposed.
In the paper, the discriminant function is derived from the Fisher principle to distinguish large pore paths in sandstone oil layers based on logging curves.
To the corresponding research on kernel locality preserving projection (KLPP) and unsupervised discriminant projection (UDP), they are combined with each other.
The score is called the Discriminant Inventory Function, or DIF.
